name: Sweetcore Brews - an otome game inspired by witchy sitcoms
short_description: An anime, choice-driven witchy otome visual novel where you bond and interact with two romance-able characters to unlock romantic scenarios in the story! Play minigames to experience branching relationship routes (GxB or GxG)
detailed_description:
Discover a captivating world of magic and romance! Immerse yourself in an otome game inspired by witchy, episodic tv sitcoms.

◆ Choose your love interest:




■ Game Experience

“Sweetcore Brews” is a choice-driven, witchy rom-com simulation where you can bond and interact with magical characters to unlock mini-games and romantic scenarios in the story! Choose your relationship with two love interests (GxB or GxG).

■ Features

-Play match-3 minigames
-Unlockable CGs
-Unlockable achievements
-Play a text-based, "mad lib" minigame to help customers with their problems
-72 chapters worth of content
